BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: The Edward E Haddock Jr Family Operating

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: LITTLE LEAGUE DOCUMENTARY - MOVIE PROJECT FOR "LONG TIME COMING" - RACIAL SEGREGATION MOVIE
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: TO PROMOTE NATURAL CONSERVATION & ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION, RESEARCH, STUDY, & EDUCATION THROUGH THE DIRECT CONSERVATION OF 244 ACRES OF UNDISTURBED FORESTLANDS IN MADISON COUNTY,NC
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: US SLAVERY & ABOLITION ARCHIVE-TO PRESERVE HISTORICALLY IMPORTANT ITEMS & MAKE THIS ARCHIVE FREELY AVAILABLE TO THE THE PUBLIC ONLINE & IN PTSHP WITH EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: SCREENINGS AND DISTRIBUTION OF DOCUMENTARY FILM LONG TIME COMING SIGNIFICANTLY CONTRIBUTED TO THE FOUNDATION'S MISSION OF RAISING AWARENESS OF ISSUES RELATED TO RACIAL SEGREGATION AND PROMOTING TOLERANCE BY HEALING HISTORIC DIVISIONS
substantially contributed to the foundation's mission of using storytelling to illuminate human issues in the conflict between Israel and Palestine.
